input.prompt:
I'm starting a new .NET MAUI app that needs a flyout menu with two sections:
"Dashboard" (single page) and "Products" (with two sub-tabs: "Active" and
"Archived"). I also need a Settings page accessible from the flyout.
Show me how to set up AppShell.xaml with this structure, including route
registration for a ProductDetailsPage that I'll navigate to from the list.

input.initialPrompt:
I'm starting a new .NET MAUI app that needs a flyout menu with two sections:
"Dashboard" (single page) and "Products" (with two sub-tabs: "Active" and
"Archived"). I also need a Settings page accessible from the flyout.
Show me how to set up AppShell.xaml with this structure, including route
registration for a ProductDetailsPage that I'll navigate to from the list.

data.content:
Here's the full setup:

**AppShell.xaml**

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<Shell
    x:Class="MyMauiApp.AppShell"
    xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
    xmlns:pages="clr-namespace:MyMauiApp.Pages"
    FlyoutBehavior="Flyout">

    <!-- Dashboard – single page, shown as a flyout item -->
    <FlyoutItem Title="Dashboard" Icon="icon_dashboard.png">
        <ShellContent
            Title="Dashboard"
            ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:DashboardPage}"
            Route="dashboard" />
    </FlyoutItem>

    <!-- Products – flyout item with two tabs -->
    <FlyoutItem Title="Products" Icon="icon_products.png">
        <Tab Title="Active">
            <ShellContent
                Title="Active"
                ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:ActiveProductsPage}"
                Route="active" />
        </Tab>
        <Tab Title="Archived">
            <ShellContent
                Title="Archived"
                ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:ArchivedProductsPage}"
                Route="archived" />
        </Tab>
    </FlyoutItem>

    <!-- Settings – single page -->
    <FlyoutItem Title="Settings" Icon="icon_settings.png">
        <ShellContent
            Title="Settings"
            ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate pages:SettingsPage}"
            Route="settings" />
    </FlyoutItem>

</Shell>
```

**AppShell.xaml.cs**

```csharp
namespace MyMauiApp;

public partial class AppShell : Shell
{
    public AppShell()
    {
        InitializeComponent();

        // Register routes not represented in the visual hierarchy.
        // Navigate with: await Shell.Current.GoToAsync(nameof(ProductDetailsPage));
        Routing.RegisterRoute(nameof(Pages.ProductDetailsPage), typeof(Pages.ProductDetailsPage));
    }
}
```

**Key points:**

- **`FlyoutItem`** = a row in the flyout menu. Wrapping multiple `Tab` elements inside one `FlyoutItem` gives you the tab bar within that section.
- **`ContentTemplate` + `DataTemplate`** = lazy-loads each page only when first visited.
- **`Routing.RegisterRoute`** is for pages outside the Shell visual tree. Navigate to it with query params:

```csharp
await Shell.Current.GoToAsync($"{nameof(ProductDetailsPage)}?id={product.Id}");
```

and receive them with `[QueryProperty("Id", "id")]` on `ProductDetailsPage`.
